name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: ⚡ SITEWIDE SALE: Black Friday ⚡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your favorite OFFICIAL Trump gear 30% off today only... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d2b7749f768e96ce387944f1ad8002ccd4df632a79a84b306a9875bbd64d2edb361d9712a9403573c484366f4adbb786)
---

Peter,

_There 's nothing better than a great Black Friday deal..._

**[And as a top supporter you've qualified for 30% OFF SITEWIDE using the code GIVING.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1d04ebd7901f3ba271998475ffbe9faf893fcb45d3ddfd66d9feba42f6ebb905b0b08a6d28186ac7fb4805bca505ce40)**

There's only one Official Trump Store, and TODAY ONLY all of your favorite merchandise is 30% off to celebrate.
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1d04ebd7901f3ba2eed6534e6a58b46d3d33be64deef16477d938af59ce161f44a3173c682a352fb3a452aac9df761b6)

_**All merchandise purchased on Black Friday is guaranteed to be delivered before the holidays, so be sure to get your stocking stuffers and gifts for family and friends before supplies run out.**_

Be sure to pass along this message if you know anyone who wants **[30% OFF OFFICIAL Trump Merchandise using the code GIVING.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1d04ebd7901f3ba2cd1e70383934eb192bb0177d26a641296e8ecad5b203db6cf3579014a8fe7a72079d38c5684f1e43)**

MAGA,

Team TRUMP

**[SHOP OFFICIAL GEAR](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1d04ebd7901f3ba241b174e4ef4af4bd8d1825a40af16086ca9d4218d5355f0afa1b348cb0ea3265d9795fb01524eacb)**
---

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1d04ebd7901f3ba2968d8f1c4aee30a6cec02a49635d823a862410497d840e76b052333808278b110145a1365f414383) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab3e47e6cad5664c95860dfe3b1dee07211b098a9a5e53cf8ff42c95e537c70391f580aaf936e6a219) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d48464a9f687254aff56537e0a91e693beb7d36701444e4905788)
---

name: Official Democratic Store
subject: [BLACK FRIDAY] Show off your Dem pride, Derek
body:

**[http://my.democrats.org/Black-Friday-Sale](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405238dd/4067b0a/428b04edd/7e581e78/493729758/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/Black-Friday-Sale1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpmydemocratsorgBlackFridaySale&utm_campaign=em_20171124_dnc_nd&source=em_20171124_dnc_nd")**

\--------
Promotion valid until 11:59 p.m. ET on Friday, November 24, 2017 at the Official Democratic Store.

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405238dd/4067b0a/428b04edd/7e581e79/493729758/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171124_dnc_nd&source=em_20171124_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405238dd/4067b0a/428b04edd/7e581e06/493729758/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171124_dnc_nd&source=em_20171124_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405238dd/4067b0a/428b04edd/7e581e07/493729758/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171124_dnc_nd&source=em_20171124_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405238dd/4067b0a/428b04edd/7e581e04/493729758/VEsHBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171124_dnc_nd&source=em_20171124_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Team Donnelly
subject: On your Black Friday deals list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Peter, this election is a chance to prove that grassroots count more than special interests, and that a Senate seat isn't something you can put on a doorbuster deals shopping list. |
---

| | Peter,

**Throughout the 2012 Senate election, national Republicans, the Koch brothers, and their special interest cronies spent over $12 million attacking Joe.** Now, they're looking to double down on their efforts -- they've already put millions into this race to distort Joe's record, with nearly a year to go. And if that weren't enough? State Rep. Mike Braun put $800,000 of _his own money_ into his campaign to win the Republican primary. **And it 's not even 2018 yet.**

Just think about all the Black Friday deals you could buy with $12 million (and counting!). Instead, the Kochs want to buy themselves another Senate seat.

Let's be clear -- these dark money groups are not interested in the needs of Hoosier families. They don't want a senator who fights against repeated attempts to gut the Affordable Care Act. They aren't interested in cracking down on unfair trade deals. And they don't care about veterans receiving quality care. The only thing they care about is their greedy corporate agenda, and they'll stop at nothing to see it through.

**We know we ask a lot -- and we know you 've got a lot of other things on your mind this time of year. But will you take a few bucks from the money you're saving on Black Friday deals and chip in to make sure Joe can keeping fighting for us?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
******[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b38/662171468/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171124nd&amount=10")******
******[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b3b/662171468/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171124nd&amount=25")******
******[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b3a/662171468/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171124nd&amount=50")******
******[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b35/662171468/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20171124nd&amount=100")******
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b34/662171468/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171124nd")****
Peter, this election is a chance to prove that grassroots count more than special interests, and that a Senate seat isn't something you can put on a doorbuster deals shopping list. Most of all, it's the only way we can keep someone who fights for real Hoosiers -- like Joe -- in the Senate. **But that all depends on you.**

**[Chip in a few extra bucks today so our campaign can execute Joe's reelection plan from now until election day.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b37/662171468/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171124nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Team Donnelly

****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b36/662171468/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20171124nd&amount=25")****
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2523/7377f838/3594fe3d/51fa5b31/662171468/VEsO/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

Now, they're looking to double down on their efforts -- they've already put millions into this race to distort Joe's record, with nearly a year to go. And if that weren't enough? State Rep. Mike Braun put $800,000 of his own money into his campaign to win the Republican primary. And it 's not even 2018 yet. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Our Store: Union-made in the USA
body:
#
Friends,
The official Our Revolution online store is opening this Monday, and if you sign up now we will send you a discount code to be used for anything in the store!
[**Sign up to receive a discount code to be used on anything in our store during this Cyber Monday, November 27.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59d8/520573909/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/store-opening?source=em171124-storeprelaunch")
[****](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59d8/520573909/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/store-opening?source=em171124-storeprelaunch")
All of our merchandise is union-printed here in the United States. Our Revolution is committed to supporting fair labor practices, middle-class jobs, and the textile and manufacturing industries that form the backbone of communities across this country.
Whether you are attending an organizing meeting, volunteering for a candidate or ballot initiative, at a march or protest, or simply going about your day, you can show the power of Our Revolution when you wear our official discounted store merchandise.
[**This discount expires on Monday night, so sign up today and use it to get some brand new Our Revolution gear while you can!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59d8/520573909/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/store-opening?source=em171124-storeprelaunch")
The political revolution is built to last. Not only does your support get you some awesome Our Revolution t-shirts, buttons, bumper stickers, and more, you also get to support our organizing efforts in communities across the country. Take the next step to becoming a part of the political revolution today.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
**[GET THE CODE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59d8/520573909/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/store-opening?source=em171124-storeprelaunch")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59db/520573909/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59da/520573909/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59c5/520573909/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae1a/bed43eb/2b7f86c6/75ff59c4/520573909/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: did-you-see@dscc.org
subject: Doug Jones 50% - Roy More 42%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Did you see that Doug Jones is leading in the recent Fox News poll of the Alabama Senate race?
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171124-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
_**Fox News Poll: Jones leads Moore by 8 points in Alabama Senate race
[Pitch in $1 now to keep up the momentum as we fight for every state >> ](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171124-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**_
Team,

Did you see that Doug Jones is leading in the recent _Fox News_ poll of the Alabama Senate race?

[**Doug needs our support to keep up the momentum right now. Pitch in $1 to stand with Doug and help Democrats fight for every state.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171124-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171124-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
This is big news -- _**but it 's also just one poll**_, and others show Moore ahead.

**Nate Silver 's _FiveThirtyEight_ says the race is "a dead heat"** \-- and pundits agree that with three weeks to go before the election, this is anyone's race.

The most important thing you can do right now is to show you're standing with Doug at this crucial moment.

**Contribute $1 right now to support Doug and fund our efforts to compete in every state, starting with the Alabama special election:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/keep-the-momentum-up**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171124-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d39a/2b07114c/cdaba2c6/73174a2e/3952490708/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d39a/2b07114c/cdaba2c6/73174a29/3952490708/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d39a/2b07114c/cdaba2c6/73174a28/3952490708/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Gillum
subject: Are you awake, friend?
body:
#
Hello,

We know you might just be waking up from a turkey coma, but we need to get this to you before you start the holiday weekend.

So, before you lace up your shoes for Black Friday deals or take that second nap, we need your help for the race ahead!

**[This weekend, Team Gillum is hosting our own type of "Black Friday" deal. If you join "Club ](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b5c/3542492870/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/black-friday-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&recurring=1&utm_content=1+-+This+weekend+Team+Gillum+is+hosting+our+")****[20.18](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b5f/3542492870/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/black-friday-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&recurring=1&utm_content=2+-+2018")****[" with a monthly $20.18 donation, you'll get a free bumper sticker! Join Club 20.18 today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b5e/3542492870/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/black-friday-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&recurring=1&utm_content=3+-++with+a+monthly+2018+donation+youll+get+")**

Not only will your contribution go towards helping Andrew make history for the Sunshine State, it's a great way to show that Team Gillum is gaining support all across Florida!

It's the gift that keeps on giving!

Andrew and all of Team Gillum know the importance of grassroots supporters -- which is why we're running a campaign by the people and for the people. And, if enough of us are willing to work together, this people-powered campaign will bring us to victory in 2018.

We have just under 12 months to go. Will you let us know you're if you're in it for the long haul?

**[Join Club 20.18 with a monthly $20.18 donation and help Andrew win in 2018. We'll even send you a FREE bumper sticker after your first donation. Don't forget to click the checkbox once completed to make your contribution recurring each month to move us forward.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b51/3542492870/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/black-friday-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&recurring=1&utm_content=4+-+Join+Club+2018+with+a+monthly+2018+donat")**

We can do this, but only if we work together.

Team Gillum

P.S. Not ready to commit to monthly yet? Your early support is still critical to this campaign. **[Make a one-time donation now and help build the foundation we need to win.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b50/3542492870/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/black-friday-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_content=5+-+Make+a+onetime+donation+now+and+help+bui")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b53/3542492870/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b52/3542492870/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&source=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3254/9e00690/412de185/24030b55/3542492870/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG&source=em17_171124_BlackF_fnd_gq_ful__TG")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: We give thanks
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_We Give Thanks_** This Thanksgiving season, we give thanks. As we gather together with our family and friends, we give thanks for our loved ones and for our good fortune to live in a state and nation where we have Republican leaders from the courthouse to the Statehouse and all the way to The White House who are working hard for us each and every day.

We also give thanks to those who wear our country's uniform, both past and present. Whether you're a veteran or are in active service, you have given your nation your time and your talents to keep our country safe and free. We owe you a debt of gratitude. And we feel so strongly about our great military, that we decided to say thank you in a big way at last week's Team Holcomb Fall Dinner.

More than 1,000 Hoosiers came out to the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis to honor the brave men and women who serve. Many of our event sponsors provided complimentary tables for these heroes, helping make this one of our largest -- and most moving -- events ever!

The night was marked by so many special moments, like when Purple Heart recipient **Josh Bleill** described in vivid detail his service in Iraq and how Hoosiers came together to support him throughout his recovery after he was injured in Fallujah. And then I'll never forget the chills that spread across the packed room when Medal of Honor recipient **Sammy L. Davis** brought out his harmonica and played us "Oh Shenandoah" in memory of the men he served with and lost in Vietnam.

This holiday weekend, take a few moments to say thank you to those who serve us all -- from the our military heroes to our local officials to volunteers throughout our communities. Their dedication and sacrifices impact us all, and for that, we give thanks.

-Kyle Hupfer

_Photo: Chairman Hupfer addresses a crowd of more than 1,000 Hoosiers -- including hundreds of military veterans -- at the First Annual Team Holcomb Fall Dinner in downtown Indianapolis._
---
| |
---
| | **What Are You Thankful For?**
**This Thanksgiving, Indiana's statewide leaders reflect on this special holiday**
---
| _"Like many of you, the Holcomb family will gather around the dinner table this Thanksgiving with grateful hearts for so many things – including our faith, family and friends. __May we all find ways to demonstrate that famous Hoosier hospitality. Providing someone a warm meal, a kind act, or words of encouragement will give added meaning to this Thanksgiving and encourage a renewed sense of hopefulness for others."_
**-Governor Eric Holcomb**
_“I am thankful for my family, my friends and the opportunity to serve Hoosiers all across our great state. I wish you and yours a happy and healthy Thanksgiving.”_
**-Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **

_"Happy Thanksgiving! May we all remember to be thankful for our many blessing today and every day. I am thankful for the love of my friends and family who inspire me on a daily basis."_
**-Secretary of State Connie Lawson**

_"I'm thankful for my family - my husband, Larry, and our family. I'm especially thankful to celebrate a combined Thanksgiving and Christmas this year with my family."_
**-Treasurer of State Kelly Mitchell**

_"This Thanksgiving, I am mindful of the gracious gift of being born in America and thankful for all the veterans and those who currently serve to keep this country safe and free. May God work in our hearts so that we may know His love and share it with others as we begin another Holiday season."_
**-****Auditor**** of State Tera Klutz**

_"I am thankful for our Indiana schools, educators, students, families and stakeholders. Working together will result in the success for all students. I am blessed to serve such a great state, and I_ _am thankful for all of the support." _
**-Superintendent of Public Instruction Dr. Jennifer McCormick**

_"I'm thankful for the many blessings God has granted me. I'm thankful that I will spend the Thanksgiving holiday with my family. I am thankful that I live in a beautiful country where I am free. And I am hopeful that this Thanksgiving, all Americans will pause and reflect on the blessings of liberty."_
**-Attorney General Curtis Hill**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e68b2968c9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Just Announced: Governor Holcomb & Lt. Governor Crouch at Congress of Counties**_
**Governor Eric Holcomb** and**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** will be headlining the Friday night reception at the **[2018 Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d5c4c6cef&e=1acd9bb3d6)**!

[Register now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c52058514&e=1acd9bb3d6) to attend this special reception sponsored by and honoring our 2018 statewide team of **Secretary of State Connie Lawson** , **Treasurer of State Kelly Mitchell** and **Audtior of State Tera Klutz**.

In addition to this fun reception, at **[Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c0dbbcdf6&e=1acd9bb3d6)** you'll also learn important skills that will help us secure Republican victories in the critical 2018 elections. But don't wait too long to register -- [our special Early Bird](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5f73f5b18b&e=1acd9bb3d6) rate of $75 expires at the end of the month!
---
|
---
|
---
| Are you interested in politics? The Indiana Republican Party is **now hiring for full-time field staff and intern positions** as part of our political, fundraising and communications teams. These positions will allow you to join a dynamic team and perform important work to help us secure more Republican victories in the 2018 election cycle.

**Apply now** by sending your resume to Derek Hugo at dhugo@indiana.gop!

Or do you know someone who would be interested? Forward this email their way, and encourage them to apply!
---
|
---
|
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=08335da868&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

---|---

---|---

subject: Two birds, one great deal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Show off your American pride _while_ supporting your conservative principles with our limited-edition hat.

As a committed conservative, we wanted to give you a shot at our newly discounted camo hat >>
